homepage.title: NUBIGON | Point Cloud Software
homepage.description: NUBIGON Pro is a point cloud visualization and animation software that helps the reality capture industry to showcase their services with ease and appeal.

NUBIGON | Point Cloud Software
Showcase Your Reality Capture & Scan-to-BIM Projects
Impress your audiences with eye-catching renders of point clouds, CAD drawings, BIM models, meshes, and Gaussian splats
EXPLORE USER PROJECTS
EXPLORE USER PROJECTS
Trusted by Leaders & Innovators
NUBIGON
The 3D Rendering Software for Reality Capture & Scan-to-BIM
NUBIGON is a premium visualization and animation software for reality capture and scan-to-BIM deliverables. It helps reality capture professionals display, analyze, and present complex data clearly and efficiently.
What can you do with NUBIGON?
VISUALIZE
Produce appealing visuals from all reality capture and scan-to-BIM assets and deliver insights
ANIMATE
Showcase your laser scanning & scan-to-BIM projects with captivating point cloud videos
COMBINE
Show all point clouds, CAD, BIM, mesh, and 3DGS assets in one place
DOCUMENT
Extract high-quality orthophotos & screenshots directly from point clouds
MEASURE
Take virtual measures, minimize site visits, and improve site documentation
ANNOTATE
Annotate points of interest &
create guided tours for virtual site exploration
EXPLORE FEATURES

about.text:
NUBIGON | About
Point cloud solutions
for the reality capture industry
Our mission is to help our users efficiently engage with massive point clouds, easily combine deliverables, and effectively showcase their services.
Our Story
Emerging Trends
During the doctoral research of our co-founder Murat Arikan at the Vienna University of Technology, our team started to explore opportunities to bring his research to market. We noticed early on that a new generation of laser scanners was improving the quality of reality capture data while driving down the costs. This was drawing in a new generation of service providers, intensifying competition among surveying and engineering firms.
Initial Steps
As Murat’s research got published in renowned peer-reviewed journals, we began working on ideas that could help service providers to stand out. Addressing two challenges became crucial: improving workflow efficiency through better data management and delivering tools for service providers to showcase their projects. Building on these findings, we set out to develop solutions to visualize and animate massive volumes of photos and laser scanner data.
Laying the foundations
To take our innovation to market, we joined the Teknopark Istanbul Research Park and the incubator program of accent Gruenderservice GmbH in Austria. Soon after that, we received a seed investment from the Netherlands-based Diffusion Capital Fund Cooperatief U.A. and the AWS impulse XS grant from the Austrian government. These opportunities allowed us to build our company, establish a US presence, and accelerate our R&D efforts.
From Prototype to Product
Subsequently, we started developing prototypes and test them with pilot projects in collaboration with partners from the architecture, engineering, and construction industries (AEC). These projects helped us refine our software and finally release our Minimum Viable Product (MVP) in late 2019.
Growing with the Market
Right off the get-go, our software received considerable attention and allowed us to build two go-to-market pipelines consisting of software subscriptions and channel partnerships. Our quarterly release schedule helps us quickly incorporate incoming feedback and expand the feature-set while our social-media centered marketing allows us to reach a growing audience.
Meet the founders
Our Backers
We are thankful for the support of...
EU And The Republic Of Turkey

Aws Impulse XS
This project is supported by the "aws impulse XS" Grant Program, funded by the Federal Ministry of Science, Research and Economy of the Republic of Austria, and administered by the Austria Wirtschaftsservice GmbH.
